description: Checks for presence or absence of required legal policy documents and disclosures in the codebase

file_presence_checks.name: Privacy policy
file_presence_checks.description: A privacy policy document must exist and be accessible from the app. Required by DPDP Act, IT Act, and Consumer Protection Rules.

file_presence_checks.name: Terms of Use / Terms of Service
file_presence_checks.description: Terms of Use or Service Agreement must exist and be accessible.

file_presence_checks.name: Grievance officer contact
file_presence_checks.description: Grievance officer contact information must be visible in the app. Required by DPDP Act, Consumer Protection Rules, and IT Rules 2021.

file_presence_checks.name: Accessibility statement
file_presence_checks.description: Accessibility statement recommended for all public apps; mandatory for SEBI-regulated entities and government portals.

file_presence_checks.name: Cookie consent / DPDP consent banner
file_presence_checks.description: Any web app collecting cookies or tracking data must show a consent mechanism before setting non-essential cookies.

file_presence_checks.name: Incident response plan / breach response
file_presence_checks.description: An incident response document or runbook reduces legal exposure under DPDP Act §8(6) and CERT-In Directions 2022.
file_presence_checks.note: Not required to be in the codebase — but its absence in project docs is a gap signal.
